text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, April 13. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. I can help troubleshoot that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the lawn mower is having issues starting. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
